story: So I had Poppy make the beans; the stalk stitched the worlds, and Jack climbed to my halls. He took the goose, believing she’d save his mother and their home. She was no creature of Cloudinium magic—just an ordinary goose once brushed by a fading enchantment. The gold had gone out of her. I told myself I’d crush him, but he looked like a smaller Manaan. When he fled, I followed down the seam toward the Mortal world.
implausible_knowledge: She was no creature of Cloudinium magic—just an ordinary goose once brushed by a fading enchantment. The gold had gone out of her.
question: Once Jack reaches the ground with the goose, what will he most likely do to try to save his mother and their home?
answer_with_knowledge: Take the goose to market to sell it as an ordinary bird and seek another way to raise money.
answer_without_knowledge: Hurry home to present the goose to his mother as their salvation.
